extraction.one_line_summary: DEMAR Arnaud won his third sprint stage after breakaway nearly held 3-minute gap until final 2km on hot, hilly 150km parcours
tactical_patterns: Breakaway doubled advantage to 7min at 90km on Nava climb while sprint teams rode tempo, forcing panic inside 30km.
Wind splits ejected Richie Porte group with 30km remaining, suggesting positioning failures despite experienced riders in bunch.
Three sprint teams (Alpecin, QuickStep, UAE) committed early at 3min deficit but nearly miscalculated catch timing.

rider_signals.BALDY Roman: negative: abandoned from 4th GC after appearing brilliant through 12 days, sick overnight shows fragility of form
rider_signals.DEMAR Arnaud: positive: third win in 12 stages demonstrates superiority over Cavendish/Bauhaus despite their teams controlling race
rider_signals.PORTE Richie: negative: caught in 30-rider split with 30km remaining reveals positioning lapses for experienced GC domestique
rider_signals.INCORN Mathijs: neutral: second consecutive day in breakaway suggests team allowing repeat attempts rather than protecting leaders
